test_path: Downloaded spark-snowflake_2.12-3.1.1.jar (570 KB) and snowflake-jdbc-3.19.0.jar (71 MB) from Maven Central. Loaded both via URLClassLoader + Thread.setContextClassLoader (the runtime-load helper) AND additionally called `spark._jsc.addJar()` so executors fetch them too — Snowflake reads happen on executors, so executor classpath must include the JARs. Then ran the standard `format('snowflake')` Spark connector with sfUser/sfPassword auth. Listed 8 tables in TEST.LOCAL (largest is BANK_TRANSACTIONS at 293M rows; smallest is CUSTOMERS at 10 rows), sampled CUSTOMERS end-to-end.
deployment_pattern: v0.3.0 runtime_load helper for driver-side class loading + spark._jsc.addJar() for executor distribution. No cluster restart required.
